common.tagline: From service invoice to digital service history – powered by OCR and AI.

footer.tagline: Smarter fleet management – less admin, more transparency.

hero.headline: Process service invoices automatically, in minutes
hero.subtitle: Upload an invoice and Valloreg reads it, categorizes it, and matches it to the vehicle. You just review – the service history builds itself.

problem.title: Sound familiar?
problem.subtitle: Fleet service data lives scattered across paper, folders, and people's heads.

scattered.title: Scattered data
scattered.description: Invoices in shoeboxes, emails, and spreadsheets – nobody sees the full picture.

manual.title: Manual data entry
manual.description: Typing every line item takes hours and is full of typos.

noInsight.title: No insight
noInsight.description: You can't tell what each vehicle costs or when the next maintenance is due.

solution.title: The Valloreg solution
solution.subtitle: One upload, and the system does the heavy lifting.

upload.title: 1. Upload
upload.description: Drag in the PDF or snap a photo of the invoice on your phone.

extract.title: 2. Extract
extract.description: OCR and AI interpret and categorize the invoice line by line.

review.title: 3. Review
review.description: Confirm only the uncertain fields – just a few clicks.

history.title: 4. Service history
history.description: The vehicle's digital history updates automatically.

features.title: Everything you need for fleet servicing
features.subtitle: A single platform, from processing to reports.

ocr.title: OCR processing
ocr.description: Accurate text extraction from PDF, JPG, and PNG – even from phone photos.

ai.title: AI categorization
ai.description: Line-by-line classification: part, labor, service – with no manual work.

multiVehicle.title: Multi-vehicle management
multiVehicle.description: Matched to the right vehicle by license plate and chassis number.

serviceBook.title: Digital service book
serviceBook.description: Every repair, part, and cost in one place, in chronological order.

dashboard.title: Cost dashboard
dashboard.description: Monthly and yearly costs, cost/km, and upcoming maintenance in one view.

multiTenant.title: Multiple companies, securely
multiTenant.description: Full tenant isolation and role-based access for all data.

preview.title: A transparent dashboard
preview.subtitle: All the fleet's key numbers at a glance.
preview.note: Illustrative preview – real data appears after you log in.

time.title: Time savings
time.description: Minutes instead of hours of manual entry – processing is automatic.

accuracy.title: Fewer errors
accuracy.description: AI filters out typos, and confidence scores show what needs checking.

transparency.title: Full transparency
transparency.description: Per-vehicle and fleet-wide costs in real time.

scalable.title: Scalable
scalable.description: From two vehicles to an unlimited fleet – your plan grows with you.

testimonials.title: What our customers say
testimonials.subtitle: Carriers and fleet managers already working with Valloreg.

first.quote: An accountant used to spend a whole day entering invoices. Now the whole thing takes minutes.
first.author: Gábor Kovács

second.quote: I finally see the real costs per vehicle. Our decisions are far better grounded.
second.author: Anikó Nagy

third.quote: It recognizes even invoices photographed on a phone flawlessly. It just works.
third.author: Péter Szabó

pricing.title: Transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your fleet. Switch anytime.
pricing.transferNote: Every plan starts with a 14-day free trial. Payment by bank transfer – we send the details by email.

STARTER.name: Starter
STARTER.description: For smaller fleets, to get started.

STANDARD.name: Standard
STANDARD.description: For growing fleets, with reports and export.

PROFESSIONAL.name: Professional
PROFESSIONAL.description: For active fleet management, with the full feature set.

BUSINESS.name: Business
BUSINESS.description: For large fleets, with no limits.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: The questions we hear most often.

fileTypes.question: What files can I upload?
fileTypes.answer: We support PDF, JPG, JPEG, and PNG formats, up to 25 MB per file.

accuracy.question: How accurate is the recognition?
accuracy.answer: The AI assigns a confidence score to every field. Uncertain fields are highlighted, so you only need to check those.

security.question: Is my data secure?
security.answer: Each company's data is fully isolated (tenant isolation), and access is governed by roles. The platform operator cannot see invoice contents.

languages.question: Which languages are available?
languages.answer: The interface is available in Hungarian, Romanian, and English; you can switch languages anytime.

cancel.question: Can I cancel anytime?
cancel.answer: Yes, your subscription can be canceled at any time, and you can freely switch between plans.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Have a question or want a personal walkthrough? Write to us.
contact.name: Name
contact.note: We'll get back to you soon. Form wiring lands in a later phase.

login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Welcome back! Sign in to your account.

register.title: Sign up
register.subtitle: Create your company account in minutes.

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
validation.taxIdInvalid: Please enter a valid tax ID.
validation.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number.
validation.passwordsMismatch: The two passwords do not match.

errors.AUTH_EMAIL_TAKEN: An account with this email already exists.
errors.AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED: Your session has expired, please log in again.
errors.AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID: Invalid session, please log in again.
errors.AUTH_UNAUTHORIZED: You need to log in for this action.
errors.AUTH_FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission for this action.
errors.TENANT_ACCESS_DENIED: You don't have access to this company.
errors.LIMIT_VEHICLES_REACHED: You've reached your plan's vehicle limit.
errors.LIMIT_USERS_REACHED: You've reached your plan's user limit.
errors.LIMIT_DOCUMENTS_REACHED: You've reached the monthly document limit.
errors.FEATURE_DISABLED: This feature is not available on your plan.
errors.INTERNAL_ERROR: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we will send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.success: If an account exists for this email, we have sent a reset link. Please check your inbox (and spam folder).

resetPassword.title: Set a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter a new password for your account.
resetPassword.success: Your password has been changed. You can now log in with your new password.
resetPassword.invalidLink: The reset link is invalid or missing. Please request a new one.

app.phaseNote: Demo view – real data wiring lands in later phases.

install.label: Install app
install.iosSteps: Tap the Share button, then choose “Add to Home Screen”.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Fleet overview.
dashboard.noData: Not enough data yet. Upload documents and add vehicles.

quickUpload.title: Quick upload
quickUpload.subtitle: Drop an invoice here – the system processes it.

empty.title: No vehicles yet
empty.description: Add a vehicle to start building its service history.

actions.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this vehicle? This cannot be undone.

history.title: Service history
history.subtitle: All service costs assigned to this vehicle.
history.empty: No service costs assigned to this vehicle yet.

scans.title: Registration scans
scans.subtitle: Upload the registration (1–2 pages) — once processed you can save it as a vehicle.
scans.uploadHint: Drop the registration photo/PDF here, or pick a file (max 2 pages).

scan.title: Scan registration certificate
scan.subtitle: Photograph or upload (image or PDF) – the system extracts the data.
scan.hint: Drop here or choose a file (1–2 pages: front/back).
scan.extraNote: Shown for verification only; the owner name is not stored.
scan.duplicateWarning: This vehicle (plate/VIN) already exists – it will be updated on save.
scan.notRegistrationWarning: This image does not look like a vehicle registration (no plate or VIN found). Check the fields or fill them in manually.
scan.errorTimeout: Processing took too long. Please try again in a few minutes.

import.title: Bulk vehicle import (CSV)
import.subtitle: Upload a CSV to add your fleet quickly. Columns: plate, vin, make, model, year, odometerKm.

scan.title: Scan {type} document
scan.subtitle: Photograph or upload the document – we extract the expiry date.

upload.title: Drag files here
upload.hint: PDF, JPG, JPEG, PNG – up to 25 MB
upload.errorUnsupported: Unsupported file type. Allowed: PDF, JPG, JPEG, PNG.

empty.title: No documents yet
empty.description: Upload your first service invoice for processing.

actions.confirmDelete: Delete this document? The invoice, line items and the file will be permanently removed.

notInvoice.title: This is not a service invoice
notInvoice.description: The system recognized this document as “{type}”, so no invoice was created.

duplicate.title: Possible duplicate
duplicate.description: An invoice with the same supplier and invoice number already exists. The duplicate cannot be kept separately – you can only overwrite the earlier one, or delete this upload.
duplicate.originalGone: The original document is no longer available (deleted in the meantime). Overwriting finalizes this document.
duplicate.confirmOverwrite: Overwrite the original invoice? The original document, its invoice and line items will be permanently deleted.
duplicate.orDelete: or delete this upload with the Delete button above.

reminders.title: Reminders
reminders.subtitle: Proactive maintenance and expiry deadlines per vehicle.

empty.title: No reminders
empty.description: Add a maintenance or expiry reminder for a vehicle.
empty.noVehicles: Add a vehicle first so you can create a reminder.

form.hint: Provide at least one due value (date or km). The interval rolls the next due forward after you mark it Done.

members.title: Members
members.name: Name
members.confirmRemove: Are you sure you want to remove {email}?

invite.title: Invite a new member
invite.note: The invitee receives an email with a link to join.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Cost analysis and export.
reports.empty: No data for the selected period.

insights.title: Cost anomalies
insights.subtitle: Overpriced items, duplicate invoices and unusual amounts from your service history.
insights.unavailable: This feature is not enabled in your plan.

empty.title: No anomalies
empty.description: No suspicious items or invoices found right now.

tco.title: Predictive TCO / replacement hint
tco.subtitle: Service cost of the last 12 months vs. the previous 12 months.

benchmark.title: Market comparison (European trends)
benchmark.subtitle: Your costs versus the anonymised median of similar fleets. A segment only appears above enough companies and vehicles.

recalls.title: Recalls
recalls.subtitle: Public recall notices for your fleet's vehicles (from a free source).

admin.title: Super Admin
admin.subtitle: Manage companies, subscriptions and features.
admin.forbidden: You do not have platform admin access.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Overview of your plan, usage and features.

subscribe.title: Subscribe (bank transfer)
subscribe.intro: Choose a plan. We'll also email you the transfer details.

subscribe.emailedFallback: The transfer details are shown below.

notifications.title: Push notifications
